name: mart-forge
description: Methodology-first Kimball data warehouse scaffolding via AI agents. Provides skills for scaffolding, auditing, evolving, and reviewing Kimball data marts on dbt + DuckDB.

skills.name: using-mart-forge
skills.description: Bootstrap — detects lifecycle phase and routes to the right skill

skills.name: mart-bootstrap
skills.description: Scaffold a complete Kimball mart from mart.yml

skills.name: dqc-audit
skills.description: Audit DQC coverage and produce a gap analysis

skills.name: schema-evolve
skills.description: Propagate source column additions through the layer stack

skills.name: mart-review
skills.description: Adversarial production-readiness review with graded scorecard
